Cache Toggle Test

  1. Open this chapter with Publisher font sizes Off.
  2. Observe that publisher CSS font-size examples are close to baseline.
  3. Enable Publisher font sizes On.
  4. Reopen/reflow the same book if required.
  5. Return to this chapter.
  6. The publisher CSS examples should now visibly change.
  7. Toggle back Off and confirm the old cached page variant is not incorrectly reused.

Baseline normal paragraph.

Inline 70% paragraph.

Class 140% paragraph.

Small text block. Big text block.

Default H2 inside small

End of test.
